rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war continues at maximum background level with no qualitative change this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty marginally affects US attention toward Ukraine but no new development.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (active combat)
top_events.summary: War remains at maximum intensity for Ukrainian residents — no qualitative change this cycle but the existential threat to daily life persists unchanged.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Continued US focus on Iran negotiations keeps American diplomatic attention divided, potentially delaying or reducing focus on Ukraine support — a concern for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Escalation in Lebanon further diverts Western attention and resources from Ukraine's conflict, adding marginal concern about reduced international focus on Ukrainian needs.
